scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:engine && npm run test:cloudflare && npm run test:security && npm run test:realtime && npm run test:leak && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:visual
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:worker
scripts.d1:migrate:staging: node scripts/require-env.mjs staging && wrangler d1 migrations apply mafiyaar-staging-db --remote --env staging
scripts.d1:migrate:production: node scripts/require-env.mjs production && wrangler d1 migrations apply mafiyaar-production-db --remote --env production
scripts.deploy:staging: node scripts/require-env.mjs staging && npm run build:web && wrangler deploy --env staging
scripts.deploy:production: node scripts/require-env.mjs production && npm run build:web && wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.test:credential-free: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test:contract && npm run test:crypto && npm run test:d1-contract && npm run test:leak && node scripts/security-check.mjs && node scripts/equal-action-test.mjs && npm run test:browser-equal-action && npm run build:web && npm run verify:production-bundle
